description_long: This sculpture depicts the Hindu deity Shiva Nataraja, shown in a dynamic dancing pose encircled by a ring of flames. The figure stands on a rectangular base, with one leg raised and the other resting atop a small figure, symbolizing the triumph over ignorance. The sculpture is highly detailed, with intricate features such as flowing hair, multiple arms, and ornate jewelry. The arch of flames surrounding the figure is adorned with evenly spaced flame motifs, adding to the sense of movement and energy. The material appears to be bronze or a similar metal, giving the sculpture a dark, metallic sheen. The overall craftsmanship suggests a traditional style, often found in public spaces or places of cultural significance.
description: A detailed bronze sculpture of Shiva Nataraja dancing within a ring of flames, standing on a rectangular base with intricate features and dynamic posture.
description_view_0: The front view shows Shiva Nataraja in full detail, with all limbs, facial features, and the encircling flames clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the sculpture, showing the protruding limbs and the thickness of the flame arch.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the figure and the arch, with less detail on the face but clear structure of the hair and flames.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the three-dimensionality and the dynamic pose of the figure.
attribute_subject_matter: Shiva Nataraja, the Hindu god depicted in a cosmic dance within a ring of flames
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
